creator: freebsd@mnd.sc
text:
There seems to be a problem with the Torch patch:

===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for rspamd-1.7.0
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to contrib/torch/torch7/lib/TH/CMakeLists.txt.rej
=> FreeBSD patch patch-contrib_torch_torch7_lib_TH_CMakeLists.txt failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es)  patch-CMakeLists.txt applied cleanly.
*** Error code 1

Consequently, rspamd-1.7.0 fails to build.
